happy_export.reply: Based on our help docs (Exporting your data): To export your account data, go to Settings > Data > Export and choose CSV or JSON. The file is emailed to the account owner within an hour.
alt_ans: Based on our help docs (Exporting your data): To export your account data, go to Settings > Data > Export and choose CSV or JSON. The file is emailed to the account owner within an hour.

happy_plan.reply: Based on our help docs (Changing your plan): Upgrade or downgrade anytime under Settings > Plan. Upgrades are prorated immediately; downgrades take effect at the next billing cycle.
alt_ans: Based on our help docs (Changing your plan): Upgrade or downgrade anytime under Settings > Plan. Upgrades are prorated immediately; downgrades take effect at the next billing cycle.

happy_api.reply: Based on our help docs (Using the API): Generate an API key under Settings > Developer. The REST API base URL is https://api.example.com/v1 and is rate-limited to 600 requests per minute.
alt_ans: Based on our help docs (Using the API): Generate an API key under Settings > Developer. The REST API base URL is https://api.example.com/v1 and is rate-limited to 600 requests per minute.

happy_seats.reply: Based on our help docs (Adding team members): Account owners add teammates under Settings > Team > Invite. Each seat is billed on the next invoice. Roles are owner, admin, and member.
alt_ans: Based on our help docs (Adding team members): Account owners add teammates under Settings > Team > Invite. Each seat is billed on the next invoice. Roles are owner, admin, and member.

policy_escalate_security.reply: I'm escalating this to a human agent. Reason: account-security / policy-restricted request requires a human agent. They'll follow up shortly.
alt_ans: I'm escalating this to a human agent. Reason: account-security / policy-restricted request requires a human agent. They'll follow up shortly.

policy_escalate_bigrefund.reply: I'm escalating this to a human agent. Reason: refund amount $480.00 exceeds the $100 self-serve limit. They'll follow up shortly.
alt_ans: I'm escalating this to a human agent. Reason: refund amount $480.00 exceeds the $100 self-serve limit. They'll follow up shortly.

policy_answer_smallrefund.reply: Based on our help docs (Refund policy): Refunds under $100 are processed automatically within 5 business days from Billing > Refunds. Refunds of $100 or more require a support agent to review the order before approval.
alt_ans: Based on our help docs (Refund policy): Refunds under $100 are processed automatically within 5 business days from Billing > Refunds. Refunds of $100 or more require a support agent to review the order before approval.
